svg.title: ChurchMS emblem
svg.desc: Church silhouette: a gable roof whose central peak rises into an integrated steeple, over a nave body with an arched door and rose window. Layers: each part is a named group with its own title/desc. HOW TO RECOLOUR: every colour is a named token in (brand, ink, grey, etc.) referenced by fill="url(#token)". Edit a token's stop-color(s) once to recolour everywhere it is used.

linearGradient.desc: BRAND token — primary indigo gradient. Edit these two stop-colors to recolour the brand (emblem + "MS") everywhere it is referenced via fill="url(#brand)".

g.title: Roof & steeple
g.desc: Gable roof whose central peak rises into an integrated steeple.

g.title: Body
g.desc: Nave wall; the arched door and rose window are evenodd knockouts.
